name: follow_up
subject: Following Up – {{offer_details}} | {{company_name}}
body:
Dear {{recipient_name}},

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to follow up on our recent proposal regarding {{offer_details}}.

We understand that decisions of this nature take time, and we want to ensure you have everything you need to make an informed choice.

{% if deadline %}

Please note that our current offer is valid until {{deadline}}.

{% endif %}

Should you have any questions, require additional information, or wish to discuss adjustments to the proposal, please feel free to reply to this email or contact us directly.

We genuinely value the opportunity to serve {{recipient_name}} and look forward to your response.

Best regards,
{{sender_name}}
{{company_name}}
